description_long: This bungalow features a modern architectural design with a flat, multi-level roof and a prominent use of wood and glass. The front facade is defined by a covered porch area with vertical wooden slats and large windows, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The structure is elevated on short stilts, with a distinctive zigzag concrete pathway leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls combine wood paneling and glass, with some sections featuring vertical wooden fins for both shade and visual interest. The roof overhangs provide protection from the elements and add to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall layout is compact and single-story, with a clear emphasis on open, airy spaces and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof, wood and glass exterior, and a covered porch with vertical slats. Features a zigzag concrete pathway and large windows for natural light.
description_view_0: This view highlights the covered porch with vertical wooden slats and the overhanging flat roof, as well as the side windows and part of the zigzag pathway.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible, showcasing the main entrance, large windows, and the full length of the zigzag concrete pathway leading to the porch.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the side elevation, showing the vertical wooden fins, the stilted base, and the extended roof overhangs.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the bungalow are visible, with additional windows and wood paneling, as well as the continuation of the porch structure.
